character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: He is the narrator and participant in the events described.

character_dossiers.name: Hands
character_dossiers.biography: He is a sailor and navigator involved in the ship's operations.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hands
character_dossiers.biography: He is a character involved in the ship's navigation and conflict.

character_dossiers.name: Cap'n Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: He is the captain of the ship and gives navigational orders.
